prompt: In image 1, remove the Royal Crown Cola carton and replace it with the Coca-Cola carton from image 2. Also, add the soup can from image 3 in front of the bread in image 1.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Additionally, add the red 'Whoop Ass Soup' can from image 3, placing it directly in front of the wrapped loaf of bread located on the left side of image 1.
objects: Royal Crown Cola carton (should not be present)
